selection.rule: select highest validation metric before evaluating the requested held-out split

metric_notes.det_map: Mean AP over center-distance thresholds 0.5, 1, 2 and 4 m.
metric_notes.beam_topK_dist_2_0m: Beam top-K recall after matching predictions to GT at a 2 m center-distance threshold.
metric_notes.beam_pred_topK_power_ratio: At GT link coordinates, the best true power among predicted top-K beams divided by oracle true power.
metric_notes.selection_metric: Validation-only val_beam_top5_dist_2_0m; never selected on the reported split.
